title: Operate tractors with attachments
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate tractors with attachments demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare tractor for operation

pcs.text: Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Source and interpret relevant machinery operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and interpret relevant machinery operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and interpret relevant machinery operation and maintenance manual and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment required for safe tractor operation and task to be undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use personal protective equipment required for safe tractor operation and task to be undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment required for safe tractor operation and task to be undertaken.

pcs.text: Conduct tractor routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct tractor routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct tractor routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Inspect for missing parts, damage, faults, or malfunctions and report and tag defects
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect for missing parts, damage, faults, or malfunctions and report and tag defects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect for missing parts, damage, faults, or malfunctions and report and tag defects.
